Notes: Initial pseudostate goes to Scheduled.
Scheduled state is explicitly modeled.
Scheduled enters Active at the start of the stop duration.
Transition powers on and sets the first segment.
Active composite state contains the train behavior.
ControlRegion represents the train control behavior.
Control composite contains the normal movement and stopping states.
Control initially enters AtStation.
AtStation is explicitly modeled.
AtStation has an entry note to open doors.
Doors close only on the nonfinal departure transition and not as a general exit behavior.
Nonfinal station departure after stopDuration goes to Moving which is the normal running state.
The nonfinal departure uses a !finalStation guard.
Final station departure after stopDuration goes to Off which represents powered off arrival.
The final station transition is guarded by finalStation.
The final station transition performs pOff.
Moving represents the state where no stop is currently required.
Required speed is set when entering or remaining in the normal moving behavior.
Moving self transition handles a new regular segment.
Regular segment is included in the self transition guard.
New red traffic light segment leads to StoppingAtLight.
Traffic light and red conditions are both present.
Green traffic light segment remains in Moving.
Traffic light and green condition are represented.
Station segments lead to StoppingAtStation but the need to stop is not checked.
The guard checks station segment only and omits stopRequired.
StoppingAtLight represents approaching a red light stop.
stopAL is executed when the red light stop is initiated.
Stopped event moves to WaitingAtLight.
WaitingAtLight represents the train waiting at the red light.
Green event returns to Moving and sets speed.
StoppingAtStation represents approaching a station stop.
stopAL is executed when the station stop is initiated.
Stopped event moves from StoppingAtStation to AtStation.
H is modeled and used to resume from Emergency.
Emergency state is explicitly modeled.
Control transitions to Emergency on obstruction which represents the emergency trigger.
Emergency transition performs eStop.
Cleared transition returns from Emergency to H.
SDSRegion is modeled as an independent region.
SDSRegion initially enters SDS_Running.
SDS_Running represents the active SDS.
SDS checks every second with a self transition.
The SDS transition is guarded by newSegmentDetected.
setCS is present but no enteringSegment event or action is generated.
No explicit no segment change transition is modeled.
No negated segment change guard is modeled.
MDSRegion is modeled as an independent region.
MDS initializes to a generic running state rather than Stopped.
No Stopped state is modeled in MDS.
No MDS transition from Stopped to Moving is modeled.
No speed greater than zero guard is modeled in MDS.
No MDS self transition for remaining stopped is modeled.
No speed equals zero guard is modeled for stopped detection.
MDS does not emit a stopped action or event.
Moving exists in control but not as an MDS detection state.
No MDS transition from Moving to Stopped is modeled.
No speed equals zero guard is modeled for Moving to Stopped.
MDS does not generate stopped when speed becomes zero.
No MDS self transition for remaining moving is modeled.
No speed greater than zero guard is modeled for remaining moving.
ODSRegion is modeled as an independent region.
ODSRegion initially enters ODS_Running.
ODS_Running represents active obstruction detection.
ODS checks every second but the obstacle case is not explicitly separated.
No obstacleDetected guard is shown.
ODS does not generate an emergency event.
The unguarded periodic check can cover normal checking but lacks the no obstacle case.
No negated obstacle guard is shown.
Off state represents the final powered off arrival condition.
No fundamentally incorrect extra states are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra transitions are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra guards are present.
Extra checking actions are reasonable internal abstractions.
No fundamentally incorrect extra composite states are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra regions are present.
No fundamentally incorrect extra history states are present.
